description: Product source-of-truth catalog. Lifecycle status for Sense360 product configurations. Validated by tests/test_product_catalog.py. config/webflash-builds.json remains the authoritative WebFlash build matrix; this catalog adds the lifecycle layer on top. PRODUCT-002 extends the catalog to enumerate every legacy/manual product YAML under products/ as legacy-compatible. legacy-compatible entries are NOT WebFlash-shippable: they have no config_string, no artifact_name, no webflash_wrapper, and webflash_build_matrix is false. WebFlash wrappers under products/webflash/ are not standalone products; they appear only as webflash_wrapper on the entry they wrap.

products.notes: Release-One production target. FanTRIAC blocked per HW-005; LED excluded because config string carries no LED token. See docs/release-one.md and docs/release-one-hardware-audit.md.

products.reason: FanTRIAC hardware mapping unresolved: S360-320 schematic uncommitted; placeholder GPIO5/GPIO6 collide with RoomIQ J10 nets; ESPHome ac_dimmer cannot run across the SX1509 expander.
products.notes: Retained as blocked / reference. Not part of production Release-One while HW-005 is open. See docs/release-one-hardware-audit.md#fantriac-mapping-resolution.

LED-bearing sibling product promoted to a preview build by PRODUCT-009. PRODUCT-006 added the canonical YAML; PRODUCT-008 added the WebFlash wrapper at products/webflash/ceiling-poe-ventiq-roomiq-led.yaml and promoted the catalog entry from compile-only to preview with webflash_build_matrix=false. PRODUCT-009 now flips webflash_build_matrix to true, declares version=1.0.0 / channel=preview / artifact_name=Sense360-Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ-LED-v1.0.0-preview.bin, and adds the matching entry to config/webflash-builds.json on the preview (non-stable) channel. No firmware artifact is built or imported by PRODUCT-009; that build / release proof remains outstanding. Release-One stays Ceiling-POE-VentIQ-RoomIQ on stable (LED-less); FanTRIAC stays blocked under HW-005 and is carried in this entry's blocked_modules. Hardware evidence: S360-300 schematic_status=verified (HW-008); ceiling LED package binds led_data_pin=GPIO38 (HW-010); LED_DATA / Sense360 LED firmware-package mapping is confirmed-ok after HW-010 (HW-009). Bench-verification Open Questions in docs/hardware/s360-300-r4-led.md (harness rail, LED count, harness identity) remain carried as preview-stage caveats and must resolve before any production promotion. See docs/product-led-preview-decision.md.
